sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Does monday.com's Revenue Growth With Softer EPS Expectations Reframe Its Expansion Trade-offs (MNDY)?
feed.summary: monday.com (NASDAQ: MNDY) is set to release its Q1 2026 earnings on May 11, with analysts anticipating revenue growth but a decline in earnings per share, highlighting a tension between expansion and profitability. The company's February 2026 guidance projected Q1 revenue of US$338-340 million and full-year revenue of US$1,452-1,462 million. Investors will be watching the earnings report closely to assess how monday.com is balancing its growth ambitions with cost management, especially concerning high R&D and sales and marketing investments.

feed.title: Pfizer Eliquis Price Move With Cost Plus Raises Questions On Valuation
feed.summary: Pfizer and Bristol Myers Squibb are collaborating with Mark Cuban's Cost Plus Drug Company to make Eliquis more accessible and transparently priced for cash-paying patients. This move, which comes as Pfizer's shares trade at $27.0 with mixed returns over different timeframes, could impact perceptions of drug pricing, distribution models, and affordability within the pharmaceutical industry. Investors are advised to consider the potential trade-off between margin and reach, and monitor prescription volumes and Eliquis economics, especially given forecasts of declining earnings for Pfizer over the next three years.

feed.title: Local nonprofits awarded grants from Columbia Gas and NiSource
feed.summary: Columbia Gas of Virginia, in partnership with NiSource Charitable Foundation, has announced the recipients of its 2026 Environmental Action Grant. Seven Virginia nonprofit organizations will share $30,000 to support environmental projects, with the Elizabeth River Project being a key recipient for its restoration efforts. Other organizations include Blue Ridge Prism, Virginia Association for Environmental Education, Rappahannock Education Farm, Keep Virginia Beautiful, Wildlife Center of Virginia, and The Urbanna Oyster Festival Foundation.
